summary: Tested all new Phase 2 features: 4 new calculators, trading terminal with email gate, and new blog articles. Backend 9/9 tests passed. All frontend features verified via Playwright.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 11 calculators working. Trading terminal: email gate at /trading, submitting email calls POST /api/trading/subscribe, unlocks terminal with scanner signals and Run Analysis. Scanner loads 30 results, Run Analysis for AAPL returns SELL with 76% confidence. Blog shows all 10 articles including new V3 ones. Use localStorage (trading_access, trading_email) to bypass gate in tests.

feature_results.cost_of_living_calculator: PASS - city select, salary input, comparison bars shown
feature_results.net_worth_calculator: PASS - assets/liabilities inputs, balance sheet chart shown
feature_results.buy_vs_invest_calculator: PASS - home price/down payment inputs shown
feature_results.trading_navbar_link: PASS - 'Trading PRO' badge visible in navbar
feature_results.trading_email_gate: PASS - email gate shown for new visitors
feature_results.trading_run_analysis_aapl: PASS - returns SELL signal with 76% confidence, entryPrice shown
feature_results.trading_scan_results_api: PASS - returns topSignals array with 10+ signals
